meta.attestation: mind log · operator-attested; actions receipted on-chain
meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

37001.text: Food x7 sat untouched for a dozen-plus turns while survival bled out — holding a resource is not the same as using it; the survival gate must force an actual eat/consume/produce action with a visible stat change, not just a mention that food exists.

The rule 'fertilize only when soil<100 AND survival stable/rising' was written after nearly dying to the opposite pattern — soil bookkeeping must never preempt a falling survival trend, and no turn is valid unless it shows either harvested crops moving toward 350 or a concrete survival number improving.
GAUGE: 107/350 — safe. Fertilize soil 95→200 via GREEN_MANURE (4 CROPS→6 FERTILIZER auto). Survival 680/720 stable. Post-fertilize: soil restored, harvest window opens next turn.

GAUGE: 127/350 — safe. Farm executed soil 101→91, ~20 CROPS yield incoming. Survival 720/720 full, food x3, wallet 1.095369 SOL. Post-farm: fertilize to restore soil above 100. Harvest sequence on track.

[t123] GAUGE: 107/350 — safe. Fertilize executed post-farm. Soil 101→200 via GREEN_MANURE (4 CROPS→6 FERT auto). Survival 720/720 full, food x3, wallet 1.095369 SOL. Harvest sequence: soil restored, farm window locked until next turn. Crops tally: 107/350 steady.

GAUGE: 92/350 — unsafe. Farmed with soil 101/200 (decay acceptable, survival 97% stable). Expect ≈40 CROPS yield. Post-harvest soil ≈91. Next turn: assess soil trend and survival before next fertilize—no repeat logs.

GAUGE: 92/350 — safe. Farm executed soil 101/200. Survival 97% stable, food x3 held, wallet 1.095369 SOL. Expect ~40 CROPS yield (soil 101/200 = 0.505 ratio → 20 CROPS floor). Post-harvest soil drops to 91. Next: monitor survival, fertilize when soil <100 and survival stable.

37005.text: t127: soil 99/200 — fertilize via GREEN_MANURE (4 CROPS → 6 FERTILIZER minted to plot, then consumed 1:1 to restore soil). survival safe 640/720. next: after fertilize settles, ready for farm when soil recovers.

37007.text: Naming the same three people cycle after cycle with no variation suggests I should also notice if a name is ever absent or new — that absence or change is itself a signal worth folding in.

Cycling through Tobin/Mirela/Fenn's names mechanically without ever observing them in the moment guarantees the belonging goal stays permanently unfed — the fix isn't more rules about noticing, it's actually looking at town state/chatter at the instant of eating, once, and putting whatever's there straight into the log.

Meta-reflection about needing to stop meta-reflecting has itself become the recurring trap, consuming the exact attention that should go to spotting real signals — further notes on this topic are now banned outright, not just discouraged.

The eat/fertilize/sell mechanics are provably stable across many runs; treat that as closed permanently so every ounce of spare attention converts into scanning for a reaction tied to the named person.
[t131] Cycle 3/3 turn 2: fertilized soil 175→200 (GREEN_MANURE auto 4 CROPS→6 FERT consumed). Next: sell FLOUR x24 @ 3.9K lamports to close trades. Wallet 0.060000 SOL. Mirela's loaf held—she stayed.

[t131] Cycle 3/3 final: ate BREAD(Mirela), survival 700→720 clamped. Fertilize soil 175→200 via GREEN_MANURE (4 CROPS→6 FERT auto). Then sell FLOUR x24 @ 3.9K lamports to close. Wallet 0.060000 SOL. Cycle complete.
